item.title: Stim with Sarah Scribbles
item.description: Self-stimulatory behavior, also known as "stimming" and self-stimulation, is the repetition of physical movements, sounds, words, moving objects, or other repetitive behaviors stimming behaviors have been shown to be healthy and beneficial—as they help regulate intense feelings—
item.dc:creator: UnspecifiedADHDLevel1

item.title: Holy shit
item.description: A cop over reacted when an acorn hits his car and unloads his sidearm at own vehicle with suspect detained in the car. Partner also starts shooting. Amazingly, no one was hurt. The initial shooter resigned a month later and his partner was exonerated. Full video: https://x.com/githii/status/1757500612143407501?s=20 After report: https://www.sheriff-okaloosa.org/wp-content/uploads/2024/02/IA-2023-031-Final-Report-Jackson.pdf Edit: made correction that they shot into a car WITH A PERSON in it.
item.dc:creator: Urouro

item.title: Hit It Off [OC]
item.description: BONUS Panels for subscribers*! You also get 19 exclusive comics (new one added every month) and “making of” time-lapse videos and write ups for every comic! Plus you get to support me, which is pretty cool! ? Subscribe wherever is most convenient for you: Patreon: https://www.patreon.com/litterboxcomics Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/becomesupporter/LitterboxComics Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/litterboxcomics * Bonus panels will go live for everyone next year when I repost
item.dc:creator: LitterboxComics

item.title: Memes are my Love Language: A Distraction Dump for Those Who Need it Today
item.description:
You're telling me FIVE different guys made this burger??
But then peasants might interact with me
This all checks out
Give it a shot, I probably won't but y'all should
Excuse me where's the 'wishlist' button, hello
Anti-theft strategy
Choose your fighter
Well they used the 'step' prefix like one time so it's all good I guess
WAS IT ME BARRY, I GENUINELY CAN'T REMEMBER
Editorial: Are Poors 'People'?
See, this is how PornHub uses 'step', shoulda put those two back to back FUCK
You really do start seeing it everywhere
Whoops how did a serious one get in, whoops I'm feelings emotions now, whoops
Fallout 4 was right I guess
Can we start a meme retirement home? There are some we definitely need to take out of rotation
Well I just thought of a new fifth reason you didn't cover, CHECKMATE
Shit now I have to make a whole new BBEG
I'm disrupting math
I am not responsible for the level of engagement you seem to require of me, thanks tho
Still a better love story oh dang it them hats fooled me again
In my experience, a lot of men need to think they're the only one who thinks a woman is attractive in order to feel secure. See 'girl next door', see 'slowly remove her glasses and brush her hair back'
I don't even remember drinking it but the glass is definitely empty
I wrote a poem to help me remember my password, I keep it on the other side of the building
The real question is, what kind of shadows does all this cast on the cave wall
WHO TOLD
The good news is, it's never too late to apologize to yourself
If this is real I'd like to kindly request a link in the comments
POV: My current Halfling Ranger
They won't teach you this in those PUA seminars
It really is
Just give me super armour. I'll take the damage just DO NOT interrupt my attack
I rarely agree with him but when he's right he's right
She took her own route but she got there in the end
His wasn't supposed to be a BG3 dump but yeah, I can't do it
Just get a bigger arm
Turns out science didn't end 50 years ago, they're still making new episodes
Be pretty cool if it was tho
Bad comparison because she's actually kinda right
That cloud has his Undivided attention
Talking to me like this will have a 100% success rate
My new Netflix special
Teach Boomers that they aren't shareholders with a vote in your reproductive decisions
A good cover reminds you of the original. A great cover replaces it.
Skeketor single-handedly created the now universally accepted Skeleton Accent
And you can too
See every Gen Xer on Facebook
Have you told a brand 'silence' lately?
Friend I BEEN asking
I thought I couldn't adore her anymore when she said this, I didn't know how high that tree could grow
Which tune would be funnier?
item.dc:creator: coolbrood

item.title: Excuse my ugly crying but I GOT THE JOB!!!
item.description: I’ve been out of work for a year because I got really, really sick. I was bedridden for months. We had to move in with my parents. I lost all of my sense of worth while we struggled to pay our bills. It was the darkest year of my life. I have been working in the human services field for 9 years, and this job offer is with the state as a case manager. I’ll have comprehensive medical insurance, a pension, an office…I’m just in disbelief and so happy!
item.dc:creator: LaFlamme4182

item.title: OMG IT'S VALENTINE'S DAY?!! (+ bonus panel!)
item.description:
Keep scrolling for a bonus panel!
Happy valentines, imgur! I'm working on a new valentines comic but it won't be ready til later this week (see my (slow) progress on twitch). Oh and https://patreon.com/LoadingArtist if you'd like more bonus panels/comics!
item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: Just decided to give back and share part of what’s been unfailingly keeping my sanity in check on this special and loving day

item.dc:creator: BipolarOP

item.title: Missing my daily morning reflection today due to a late late drive home. Pounded a couple cokes and had my wife talk to me on the drive home.
item.description: When I was a kid, my apartment had German cockroaches. They're fucking disgusting and incredibly impossible to get rid of. Finding them all over the floor at the place I was staying at, at 2am! I was grossed out. None of our stuff was on the floors, but we washed everything in hot water. I'm so scared that I brought one home! Woke up at 1pm, I'm exhausted and could sleep more. But the Tool concert was really good, especially playing Rosetta Stoned live which is my favorite Tool song.
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: My heart! After a 16yr old soccer player was shot in Mexico by a cop who wrongly thought he was a criminal his friends had him score one more goal at his funeral!! Heartbreaking and heartwarming at the same time
item.description: His name was Alexander Madtínez An old story, but I hadn't seen this video before and really thought it was worth sharing! He clearly had great friends and was a great kid!
item.dc:creator: DumpingSh1tandBeingKind2

item.title: Friend's Doodle, figured ya'll would love it
item.description: It's one of his many OC's dancing, gal and cat from his webtoons series. Someone tell me how to steal images off of webtoons and I'll give you a 4th wall breaking cat comic, cause he probably doesn't have said comics on his computer anymore, and webtoons doesn't want me downloading it. https://twitter.com/souldroids/status/1756943894900519139

item.title: Silver lining...
item.description: I have been absolutely dreading the upcoming election season. American politics is a fucking shit show, embarrassing (as a US citizen), and profoundly depressing. But learning that Jon Stewart is back hosting the Daily Show through the election rates as some of the best TV news that I've heard in years. Now... let's work on reviving Firefly.
item.dc:creator: loudloutishlover
